message:
feat(membrane): add sparse-recovery and robust fusion runtime math controllers

Introduces two new online controllers in the runtime_math subsystem:

1. sparse.rs — Online L1 sparse-recovery controller (ISTA-based) that
   infers concentrated vs diffuse latent fault sources from executed-probe
   anomaly vectors. States: Calibrating → Stable → Focused → Diffuse →
   Critical. Feeds strict/hardened risk escalation based on support-size
   and residual EWMA thresholds.

2. fusion.rs — Adaptive robust weighted fusion controller that computes
   fusion_bonus_ppm from cross-kernel severity signals using multiplicative
   weight updates. Provides online entropy and weight-drift telemetry,
   reducing double-counted noise while accelerating coherent multi-signal
   escalation.

Integration into mod.rs:
- Both controllers registered in RuntimeMathKernel with cached atomic state
- Sparse anomaly vector assembled from all 11 probe dimensions
- Fusion observes severity snapshot from all cached kernel states
- Risk computation incorporates sparse_bonus + fusion_bonus into pre-design
  risk accumulator
- Sparse Critical state forces Full validation profile
- Snapshot telemetry extended with sparse/fusion diagnostic fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
